name: Endo and Kobayashi Live! The Latest on Tsundere Villainess Lieselotte
original_name: ツンデレ悪役令嬢リーゼロッテと実況の遠藤くんと解説の小林さん
overview: Endo and Kobayashi love to bicker about their latest video game fixation. They think they're simply providing color commentary, but one of the game's characters, Siegwald, can hear them talking about his fiancée, the villainess Lieselotte!
